description_long: This is a rustic, cylindrical beer mug crafted from dark, richly grained wood, reinforced with two black metal bands encircling its upper and lower sections. The mug features a robust, angular black metal handle attached to one side, providing a sturdy grip. On the opposite side, a large embossed dragon motif is carved into the wood, adding a decorative and mythical touch. The wood surface displays visible grain patterns and subtle wear, suggesting a hand-crafted, medieval or fantasy-inspired design. The interior is also wooden, with a slightly glossy finish, and the mug is open at the top, ready to be filled. The overall construction appears solid and functional, suitable for holding beverages in a tavern or urban pub setting.
description: A dark wooden beer mug with black metal bands, a sturdy handle, and an embossed dragon design. The mug has a rustic, medieval appearance and is open at the top.
description_view_0: The mug is shown with its handle prominently on the right, displaying the wood grain and metal bands clearly.
description_view_1: This view highlights the back of the mug, where a vertical black metal strip reinforces the structure between the bands.
description_view_2: The handle is now on the left, showing the opposite side of the mug with uninterrupted wood grain and metal bands.
description_view_3: The front of the mug features a large, detailed dragon emblem carved into the wood, with the handle barely visible at the back.
attribute_graphic_design: The exterior features a carved dragon motif on one side, with black metal bands and a vertical strip for reinforcement. The design is rustic and medieval, with no visible text or modern graphics.
